positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of celestial flora and fauna. The scene features stylized crescent moons, glowing constellations, and blooming nebula flowers, all interconnected by flowing lines of cosmic energy. Rendered in an intricate, antique engraving and linocut style, utilizing a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo, shimmering gold, and cream. The composition must be perfectly centralized, emphasizing clean, bold silhouettes and dramatic contrast, optimized for a clean, commercial apparel print.
